title: cucubalus behen var. maritimus
intro: Cucubalus behen var. maritimus, also known as sea spurrey, is a plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The herbal preparations of sea spurrey typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
